title: Add PolliArt Studio to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [PolliArt Studio](https://github.com/wwishao/polli-art-studio) to image
- Generate AI artwork from text prompts using the pollinations.ai API in PolliArt Studio. Choose Flux (free) or Turbo models and save generation history in local storage with a gallery view.

Fixes #11865

gist.headline: PolliArt Studio joins the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: PolliArt Studio has sprouted in the Greenhouse! Generate AI artwork with Flux or Turbo models and keep track of your masterpieces in a local gallery.
gist.summary: Added PolliArt Studio to the community apps directory, featuring text-to-image generation via Flux and Turbo models with local gallery history.
gist.impact: Users can now discover PolliArt Studio in the Greenhouse to generate and manage their AI artwork locally.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as an artist in a cozy studio, representing 'PolliArt Studio'. The Monitor Robot admiring a gallery wall to represent the local storage gallery view.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a digital canvas in a warm art studio. A chunky retro monitor robot stands nearby, admiring a gallery wall of pixelated landscapes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a digital canvas in a warm art studio. A chunky retro monitor robot stands nearby, admiring a gallery wall of pixelated landscapes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background.
